Package com.dtwthalion.mpgo

Class SpectrumIndex

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.mpgo.SpectrumIndex
public class SpectrumIndex extends Object
Compressed-domain query index for spectra in an acquisition run.

Parallel arrays: offsets, lengths, retention times, MS levels, polarities, precursor m/z, precursor charges, base peak intensities. Kept entirely in memory; signal channels remain lazy on disk.

HDF5 layout: <run>/spectrum_index/ group with named datasets.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C MPGOSpectrumIndex, Python mpeg_o.acquisition_run.SpectrumIndex.

Since:
0.6

    • indicesInRetentionTimeRange

      public List<Integer> indicesInRetentionTimeRange(ValueRange range)
      Returns:
      indices whose retention time lies within [range.minimum(), range.maximum()].

    • indicesForMsLevel

      public List<Integer> indicesForMsLevel(int msLevel)
      Returns:
      indices whose msLevel equals msLevel.

    • writeTo

      public void writeTo(Hdf5Group runGroup)
      Write this index to an HDF5 group (creates spectrum_index/ subgroup).
